name: xf_cep_acc_multiupd_plain
drl:
rule W0 when accumulate( E(tag == "z"); $c : count() ) then end
rule W1 when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: D-155 residual -> D-160 FIXED (graduated): same-epoch out-and-back double-update (z->x->z) of a plain-acc member composed with a windowed sibling + insert. Oracle entries evaluate against the epoch-FINAL bean - the member never leaves (count 2). The engine's immediate per-call arms saw the intermediate x state and lost the member via staged del+ins. Fix: plain-acc external updates of evented sources defer to the same per-entry drain (final-fields evaluation, no intermediate transitions).
